/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.9/cuda/12.6/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler -I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.9/comm_libs/12.6/nvshmem/include -L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.9/comm_libs/12.6/nvshmem/lib -lnvshmem_host -lnvshmem_device -lcuda -D_FORCE_INLINES -DVERBOSE --expt-extended-lambda -use_fast_math --expt-relaxed-constexpr "--generate-code=arch=compute_89,code=[compute_89,sm_89]" -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink --options-file CMakeFiles/lu_mustard.dir/deviceObjects1.rsp -o CMakeFiles/lu_mustard.dir/cmake_device_link.o --options-file CMakeFiles/lu_mustard.dir/deviceLinkLibs.rsp
